texto: Bass players share a secret fellowship, a sort of gnosis peculiar to their breed, a kind of smart that is hard for others to recognize or understand: the art of the whole sound. Bass players actually believe in musical epistemology, they are practitioners of musical metaphysics.
explicacao: Citação de Randall E. Auxier sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Bass players share a secret fellowship, a sort of gnosis peculiar to their breed, a kind of smart…” articula reflexao, music, players em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
